name: Broccoli Souffle
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Broccoli, chopped and thawed - drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise and flour; mix well.
2. Gradually add milk; stir constantly over low heat until thickened.
3. Add salt and cheese; continue cooking until cheese melts.
4. Cool slightly; stir in broccoli and lightly beaten egg yolks.
5. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites; pour mixture into a 1-1/2 quart casserole.
6. Make a slight indentation around the top of the souffle to form a top hat.
7. Bake at 300 degrees for 10 minutes and 15 seconds. Serve immediately.
Variation: Add 3/4 cup finely chopped ham and omit salt.
